g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does team member login and RBAC work?')
sendPrompt('What three stat cards are on the member dashboard?')
g.text: Total assigned · Pending tickets · Total time spent (sum of all logs)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does the user ticket list only show tickets assigned to the current user?')
g.text: My ticket list — assigned to current user only
Title · Firm · Priority · Est. time · Spent time · Status

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What read-only information does the user see on the ticket detail page?')
sendPrompt('How does estimated time entry work and what log does it create?')
g.text: User only — admin cannot set this

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the time log panel work — what are the rules?')
g.text: + Add log: hours + comment · Append-only (no editing past entries)
Total time spent = sum of all logs (live) · Log history: date · hrs · comment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are in the resolution modal and why is it forward-only?')
g.text: Resolution modal — forward only, no loop back
Estimated time (editable) · Total spent (read-only from logs) · Final comment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens after a ticket is confirmed resolved?')
g.text: Status → resolved · Final log auto-created · Admin view updates in real-time
RBAC: member sees only their assigned tickets · No access to firms, transcripts, or team
